verdict_reasoning: DeepSeek upstream recovered between the previous security-hygiene gate and this retry. One real-DeepSeek opt-in call with the rotated user-scope key returned HTTP 200 in ~8s with full structured advisory output. All G2 evidence triple parts satisfied (host log + DB row distinct from Mock + shape evidence). G5 stub-fingerprint absent. Mock default smoke also re-confirmed. DB / audit / outbox all incremented correctly with matching CorrelationId. Independent inspector CLEARED 13/13 — zero warnings, zero failures. Zero key value leakage in any output / tracked file / log / handoff.
